executives.name: Abhi Talwalkar
executives.background: Former President and CEO of LSI Corporation. Director since 2017.

executives.name: Abhijit Talwalkar
executives.background: Mr. Talwalkar has been a director since 2011 and Chairman of the Board since 2019. He was President and CEO of LSI Corporation from 2005 to 2014.

executives.name: John Van Scoter
executives.background: Mr. Van Scoter has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since June 2023. Prior to joining Solid Power, Mr. Van Scoter served as Vice President of SRI International, a nonprofit research institute, from 2019 to 2023. From 2010 to 2018, he was the CEO and President of eSolar, Inc., a concentrated solar power technology company. Earlier in his career, he spent over 25 years at Texas Instruments.

executives.name: Lynn Dugle
executives.background: Ms. Dugle was the CEO and President of Engility Holdings, Inc. and held senior leadership positions at Raytheon Company.

executives.name: Pierre Brondeau
executives.background: Dr. Brondeau has served as Chairman of the Board of Livent since 2018. He is the former CEO and Chairman of FMC Corporation. He also serves on the board of TE Connectivity Ltd.
